scripts.build: npm run build -w @itharbors/sqlite-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-cli && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/sqlite-core && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/sqlite-data && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/sqlite-explorer && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/sqlite-relationships && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/sqlite-schema && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build plugins/sqlite-sql
scripts.test:prepare: node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build ../../plugins/panel && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build ../../plugins/message && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build ../../plugins/menu && node ../../scripts/ce-plugin.mjs build ../../plugins/config
scripts.test: npm run test:prepare && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
